caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone held by a boom arm; the arm features the text "Rode PSA1 Plus". Behind him is a wall covered in dark grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. Across the sequence, the man is talking and gesturing with his left hand. He begins by raising his hand near his head, then lifts it higher and further away from his body, before lowering it and moving it back toward his chest. His facial expression remains animated as he speaks, with his gaze shifting slightly. Throughout the clip, his right arm, which has a visible tattoo, remains mostly stationary by his side.
